hooks.command: if ! find src/ app/ -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; ruff check --select E,F,W --exit-zero . 2>&1 | tail -15

if ! find src/ app/ -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; if ! git diff --quiet HEAD -- src/ app/ tests/ alembic/ pyproject.toml requirements*.txt 2>/dev/null || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- src/ app/ tests/ 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo 'Invoque /jarvis-test-flow agora' >&2; exit 2; fi
